system.description:
Discipline: Qinggong
Skill: Speed against Parry
Type: Counter
Qi: 1

When an opponent strikes at you with a melee weapon, you leap upon it to avoid the attack. If the original Attack would have missed, you can also stride toward your foe and deliver a deadly Attack. When an opponent makes a melee weapon Attack against you, roll Speed against the attacker’s Parry. On a Success, you pounce onto the melee weapon. If the opponent’s Attack roll against you was a Failure, you can also walk quickly toward the enemy to deliver a normal mundane Attack (you cannot deliver a Kung Fu Technique). Cathartic: If the opponent misses you, you can deliver a Kung Fu Technique rather than a mundane Attack. Even if you would have been hit by the Attack, you can still deliver a mundane Attack as part of this counter.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: If the opponent misses you, you can deliver a Kung Fu Technique rather than a mundane Attack. Even if you would have been hit by the Attack, you can still deliver a mundane Attack as part of this counter.
